nation: Mohawks of the Bay of Quinte
economic_notes: Band owns wind power investment (Yaote ET Wind Inc./Ernestown Windpark LP) and solar power investment (Yaote LS Solar Inc./Loyalist Solar LP - 50% ownership, GBE). Also holds investment in Mohawk Golf Course Limited Partnership (GBE). Deposits of $2,440,000 on purchase of golf course land and assets recorded during year.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Six fully consolidated subsidiaries (Yaote Holdings Limited, Yaote ET Wind Inc., Yaote LS Solar Inc., 2821066 Ontario Inc., 2815751 Ontario Inc., 2815756 Ontario Inc.). Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Loyalist Solar LP (solar power) and Mohawk Golf Course Limited Partnership. Auditor firm name not fully legible - identified as Chartered Professional Accountants in Belleville, Ontario; firm name not explicitly stated in extracted text. ISC funding per Note 3 represents 50.3% of total revenue. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($22,793,005) + Health and Welfare ($2,929,691) + CMHC ($471,255) + Kagita Mikam ($173,111) + Other federal ($191,763) + Province of Ontario ($6,530,517) + AIAI ($1,214,707) + County of Hastings ($160,774) = $34,464,823 but AIAI and County of Hastings may not be government transfers; conservative estimate used. Deposits of $2,440,000 on golf course land purchase noted as unusual item. Loans payable to Yaote LS Solar Inc. ($13,694,568) relate to BluEarth Renewables Partnership loan held within consolidated entity. Net financial assets per balance sheet = $36,066,019. Remuneration schedules referenced (Schedule F and G) but detail not provided in extracted text.
